---
title: "Authoring"
format:
  html:
    axe: true
---

# HTML

## Including additional formats

When rendering to HTML documents, you can include links to other formats in the YAML header. This allows you to create multiple versions of the same document, each with a different output format. For example, you could create an HTML version for web viewing and a PDF version for printing. You can find more information about this feature in the [Quarto documentation](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/html-multi-format.html).

## Accessibility checks

[HTML Accessibility Checks](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/html-accessibility.html)
